mapper.insert: INSERT INTO card_transaction ( user_id, oapi_card_altr_no, auth_number, approved_at, amount, is_cancelled, cancel_amount, cancelled_at, merchant_name, merchant_industry_code, merchant_industry, installment_month, currency, foreign_amount, purchase_date ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{oapiCardAltrNo}, #{authNumber}, #{approvedAt}, #{amount}, #{isCancelled}, #{cancelAmount}, #{cancelledAt}, #{merchantName}, #{merchantIndustryCode}, #{merchantIndustry}, #{installmentMonth}, #{currency}, #{foreignAmount}, #{purchaseDate} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM card_transaction WHERE oapi_card_altr_no = #{oapiCardAltrNo} ORDER BY approved_at DESC
